title: Web Scanning Activity
author: Detection Engineering Team
description: Detects repeated HTTP 404 responses from the same source IP within a short time window, indicating automated scanning of web application paths and endpoints.
false_positive_notes: Web crawlers and search engine bots hitting broken links. Legitimate penetration testing activity. Misconfigured applications generating 404s internally. Whitelist known scanner IPs.
severity_rationale: MEDIUM because scanning is reconnaissance only. No immediate impact but signals attacker interest and precedes exploitation attempts.
